title: Rotting Oranges
hints: This problem involves spreading a state over time in steps, similar to how a fire spreads or ripples expand in water.
Use Breadth-First Search (BFS) starting from all initially rotten oranges simultaneously to simulate the rotting process minute by minute.
Track the maximum distance any fresh orange is from a rotten one; if any fresh orange is unreachable after the search, return -1.
